title: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: An independent discounted cash flow (DCF) intrinsic value analysis of Amgen Inc. (AMGN) compiled entirely by Gemini 3.1.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 4.0% - Modest growth as contributions from the obesity pipeline and acquisitions offset declines in legacy blockbuster drugs.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 1.5% - Conservative terminal rate typical for mature biopharma companies facing perpetual patent cliffs and pricing pressure.
assumptions.discountRate: 7.0% - A lower discount rate reflecting stable cash flows, a strong dividend, and a low Beta (0.42).
